location: Starting equipment for the Astrologer class. Also an uncommon drop (about 2%) from scimitar-and-shield Skeletons found in several catacombs; most easily farmed at Deathtouched Catacombs in Limgrave, where one Skeleton stands just past the entrance grace and another near the second staircase.
tactics: These skeletons can resurrect once knocked down unless you land a follow-up hit or use a holy-infused weapon — don't turn your back on a 'dead' one too soon.

The same shield-carrying skeleton type also appears in Auriza Hero's Grave, Black Knife Catacombs, Gelmir Hero's Grave, Tombsward Catacombs, and Stone Coffin Fissure, so any of those work as alternate farm spots.
You don't need to reach Deathtouched Catacombs' boss, the Erdtree Burial Watchdog, to farm the skeletons near the entrance.
lore: A small wooden roundshield etched with ancient cipher markings around its rim — the engravings grant a modest boost to holy damage negation despite the shield's otherwise humble construction.

builds.name: Holy-resistant Strength shield
builds.why: Best holy negation among the plain wooden shields for only 8 Strength, useful early protection against undead and holy-damage enemies.
